sqls.name: enrollment_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW enrollment_view AS SELECT CID, CName, Division FROM Course JOIN Enrolled_in ON Course.CID = Enrolled_in.CID JOIN Department ON Course.DNO = Department.DNO;

sqls.name: enrollment_hours_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW enrollment_hours_view AS SELECT Hours, Days, CID FROM Course;

sqls.name: student_age_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW student_age_view AS SELECT StuID, Age, Division FROM Student JOIN Enrolled_in ON Student.StuID = Enrolled_in.StuID JOIN.Department ON Student.Major = Department.DNO;

outputs.sqlErrMsg: Execution failed on sql 'SELECT * FROM enrollment_view': ambiguous column name: CID
